title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Perkins Coie Holding Ltd
body: "Application number 5123  Applicant Perkins Coie LLP objected to the name used by Perkins Coie Holding Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 16 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Perkins Coie Holding Ltd is changed to SC812323, Ltd. "
